2212650.name: Zako Slayer
2212650.description:
Story
A female super soldier, sleeping in a base, was released by accident during an attack by unknown intruders.
Her memory is lost; she doesn't know who she is.
The objective is to break through the enemies and escape from the base.

Genre
2D Platformer, shooting in bullet hell style with hack and slash.

Game play
Close and range combat
- Close combat with a sword like a warrior.
- Shooting in Bullet hell style. Take cover behind an object, even the bodies of enemies and friends.
- Sneak behind the enemies and attack them from behind or above.
- Complex enemies' behavior.

About 10-20 minute of gameplay.
2212650.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
